name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality (e.g. a new module container, backend capability)
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What are you trying to do?**
The underlying use case, not just the proposed API.

**Proposed approach**
If you have one.

**Backend considerations**
Does this apply to both backends equally, or does it only make sense on one
(Docker vs. microsandbox)?

**Runtime considerations**
Anything Node-vs-Bun specific about the proposal?

**Alternatives considered**
